source_meta.source_document: Triathlon TS Knee System Surgical protocol

TRAYS.Tray Notes: Official Triathlon TS revision materials support dedicated reamer-based revision instrumentation and component preparation workflow.

COMPONENTS.Component Notes: Official Triathlon TS materials describe the total stabilizer femoral component as the core revision femoral implant.
Official Triathlon TS materials describe the revision baseplate that extends the construct into revision workflows.
Official Triathlon TS materials describe the TS insert X3 as the constrained polyethylene bearing option.
The official surgical protocol lists Triathlon femoral distal augment options and catalog codes.

PRODUCTS.Product Notes: Catalog code explicitly listed in the official Triathlon TS surgical protocol PDF.

row.system_notes: Semi-constrained revision knee platform anchored to the official Stryker Triathlon TS revision page and surgical protocol.
